title: Monday.com Driving You Mad? 😫 Vent Your Frustrations Here!
excerpt:
Grappling with repetitive tasks that drain your time?
Bottlenecks slowing you down at every
Annoying issues throwing a wrench in your workflows?
Something that you wish monday.com would have for you?

posts.author: banana (Ian H)
posts.cookedHtml:
• Grappling with repetitive tasks that drain your time?
  • Bottlenecks slowing you down at every
  • Annoying issues throwing a wrench in your workflows?
  • Something that you wish monday.com would have for you?

Share what’s NOT working for you. The more specific, the better. No frustration is too small!

I’m a developer looking to build solutions to help you save time and energy.
Thank you for sharing, I’m here to listen and appreciate your time.

Don’t suffer in silence—let’s make Mondays easier!

Note: I couldn’t find another topic discussing current issues, problems, annoyances. Please let me know if this post is in the wrong place.
